description: Legal record. Dated Friday, 3 Av or July 4, 1231. Scribal notes for a draft of a partnership contract. The notes state that Abū Sa‘d has 83 dinars (minus two qirāṭs) together with Manṣūr b. the great-grandson, Suleymān b. ‘Imrān and Futūḥ b. Abū al-‘Izz, with the profit to be split in two halves, half for Futūḥ b. Abū al-‘Izz (less a twenty-fourth) and half for Abū Sa‘d, with Suleymān given 19 as a commenda. The full details of these notes are delineated in the contract itself (see TS 8 J 6.9, verso). (Information from Lieberman, "A Partnership Culture," 182-183)
description_he: רשומה משפטית, ה' אב (4 יולי 1231). טיוטת הערות לחוזה שותפות: אבו סעד מחזיק 83 דינר עם שותפים, הרווח מחולק לשנים — מחציתו לפתוח בן אבו אל-עז ומחציתו לאבו סעד.
